description: Style Note A range of perfumes inspired by the sea, nautilus gives you fresh lasting fragrances that you will love.Product Details Pois Nautilus is a spray perfume for women which comes in a blue glass flask with a light blue top Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize 40 mlStyle NoteA range of perfumes inspired by the sea, Nautilus gives you fresh lasting fragrances that you will love.Product Details  Pois Nautilus is a spray perfume for women which comes in a blue glass flask with a light blue top  Caution  Do not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize  40 ml
